title: ammannia baumii
intro: Ammannia baumii, also known as Red Kidny or Red Ammannia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lythraceae and is native to tropical Africa. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ammannia baumii include treating kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and other kidney problems, as well as alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Ammannia baumii is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and it can also be used as a tincture or added to other herbal preparations.
